name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ConfigureBulletsHelper.ImpulseOneLegMult
summary: Amount to scale impulse by if the character is contacting with one foot only and dynamicBalance is OK and impulse is above impulseAirMultStart.
remarks:
Default value = 1.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
